codeReview.summary: The feature correctly adds coverage and implementation for failed-link branching, retry-to-upload behavior, and pending resume flow mechanics. I found one user-facing branch-context mismatch on resumed openpgp pending sessions, plus a related assertion gap in the new tuistory scenario.

issues.description: Resumed GPG sessions derive `_verification_action` from `contributor_type`, so configs saved after an openpgp publish (with `contributor_type="github"` from `_apply_selected_config`) are resumed as `github-gpg`. This shows GitHub-propagation instructions instead of openpgp verification guidance on the pending resume path (see snapshot evidence).

The `test_openpgp_publish_pending_resume` rerun assertions only check that username prompt and Contribute CTA are absent; they do not assert openpgp-specific pending instructions on resume, allowing link-path context regressions to pass.

sharedStateObservations.observation: VAL-CROSS-004 checks pending-resume mechanics but does not pin method-specific resumed instructions for openpgp, which allowed a GitHub-specific guidance mismatch in the openpgp resume snapshot to go unnoticed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: validation-contract.md:916-940 defines VAL-CROSS-004 pass criteria without resumed instruction-copy checks; openpgp resume snapshot shows GitHub guidance at client/tests/tuistory/setup/__snapshots__/openpgp-publish-pending-resume/04-post-escape-rerun-pending_80x24.txt:17.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker procedure deviation on orphan-process checks was justified by local pre-existing processes; the skill still leads with a broad grep command and then a note to narrow, which can continue causing false alarms.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff skillFeedback marks followedProcedure=false due using narrowed grep (handoff JSON lines 72-83), while skill step 8 still starts with broad pattern command before advising narrower usage (.factory/skills/tui-tests-worker/SKILL.md:85).

summary: Review of commit 69d1a90 found the feature functionally aligned with pending/failed branch goals and retry invariants. Non-blocking issue: resumed openpgp pending flows currently show GitHub propagation guidance due resumed action inference, and the new scenario assertions do not catch this.
